ground_truth.title: How Much Does it Cost to Get Electrical Services in Ponchatoula?
ground_truth.main_content: The average electrician cost in Ponchatoula is $876 - $1,042, but it could vary from $793 to $1,125. This estimate is based on actual data from 31 completed projects in Ponchatoula area and is valid through 01/23/2026. A licensed electrician averages about $39-$54 each hour. If the electrical job is performed by non-licensed electricians, the rate would possibly be lower. Electricity and any issues relating to it should only be handled by a licensed electrician because electricity is a very dangerous thing and can cause death and loss of property if not handled properly.
